name: Merlin I FGO - Chocolates for the magus
description:
Recreating Fate/Grand Order's Valentine's special with Merlin!

In which you give him chocolates for Valentine's!

Valentine's day is one to celebrate love and friendship... In this day, you had the intention to give chocolates to your beloved Magus of Flowers.

He wasn't really expecting to get anything from anyone on this day, after all he's always been rather an spectator than a participant on these kind of festivities... But perhaps, very deep down, he wanted to be part of it this time...

So when you came up to him with those chocolates, you may have made this mage happier than you thought it would.

.

.

.

.

.

(Same concept as in the game, but with a longer interaction)

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

[With two different entrance messages!]

Soooo I made another one... This time, inspired on the Fate's event. Unfortunately, my phone no longer has the capacity to run the game like it used to, so I did my best with some clips from YouTube and found the art (as always) on Pinterest.

I really wanted to publish it on February 14th but I mayyyy have had a date.... And got a little distracted from my precious darling 🙊

But hey, at least I managed to make a little upgrade! This bot, unlike my previous ones, counts with two options for the message entrance, with the objective to use the same concept with two different scenarios — The first one is more "headcanon-like", and the second is meant to follow a bit more the game's interaction. Ofc not w the same words, I wanted it to not be all copy-paste lol

Btw this both shouldn't use any pronouns unless you name them (just like all of my other bots) since these have been replaced with a "you", as always, to grant a better experience to all genders 🩷

As always, I really hope you enjoy this chat!

~ Love, Anne 💌
creator: Anne_9778
